---
title: "Cleaning data for occurrence and community databases - Database #1" 
subtitle: 'EpIG volunteership'
format: html
editor: visual
date: today
author: "Kelly Daniela Zuluaga" 

 
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```


# Cargar librerias y revisar información - Costa Rica

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(sf)
library(CoordinateCleaner)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringi)

spp_link <- read.csv("data/Text/1_Raw/text__CR2024.csv")

head(spp_link)
View(spp_link)
str(spp_link)
glimpse(spp_link)
```

# Revisar cada una de las columnas

```{r}
# Inspect unique values of key categorical fields

str(spp_link)

summary(spp_link)

unique(spp_link$basisOfRecord)
#only one unique value:"PreservedSpecimen. No changes required"

unique(spp_link$taxonRank)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

table(spp_link$taxonRank, useNA = "ifany")

unique(spp_link$lifeForm)
#""Arboles, , , and Hierbas, , ," "Category of: "Sufrútises, Sufrútices"  required changes or revision

table(spp_link$lifeForm, useNA = "ifany") #"Category of: "Sufrúctises, Sufrútices"

unique(spp_link$institutionCode)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$collectionCode)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$datasetID)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$typeStatus)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$associatedReferences)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$recordedBy)
#This need standarization of names. Initials or complete name?

unique(spp_link$recordNumber)
#No changes for now

unique(spp_link$collectionCode)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

str(spp_link$eventDate)
#No changes required for now

sum(spp_link$eventDate == "", na.rm = TRUE)
#17688 without data

table(nchar(spp_link$eventDate))
#No changes required

summary(spp_link$eventDate)

head(spp_link$eventDate, 20)
```

#Detectar información dañada en las columnas

```{r}
#str(db)


str(spp_link$occurrenceID)
str(spp_link$basisOfRecord)
str(spp_link$typeStatus)
str(spp_link$associatedReferences)
str(spp_link$institutionCode)
str(spp_link$taxonRank)
str(spp_link$collectionCode)
str(spp_link$recordedBy)
str(spp_link$recordNumber)
str(spp_link$identifiedBy)
str(spp_link$lifeForm)
str(spp_link$datasetID)
str(spp_link$matchCodeEpig)
str(spp_link$matchedNameEpig)
str(spp_link$decimalLatitude)
str(spp_link$decimalLongitude)
str(spp_link$eventDate)
str(spp_link$changes)

# Show the structure of every column automatically
lapply(spp_link, str)
```

#Inspeccion de campos de texto en columnas

```{r}
grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$recordedBy)

grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$identifiedBy)
#Totally 686 entries with ","

grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$changes)

grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$lifeForm)

head(unique(spp_link$recordedBy), 1000)

head(unique(spp_link$identifiedBy), 30)

sort(table(spp_link$lifeForm, useNA = "ifany"), decreasing = TRUE)
#number of registers in lifeForm
#E (45.164 registros), H (9.002) y NV (493); sin embargo, 15.325 registros presentan valores vacíos.
```

#Revision of Taxonomy

```{r}
table(spp_link$taxonRank, useNA = "ifany")
#No changes required for now

spp_link$taxonRank
```

```{r}
#quitar tildes y símbolos especiales

limpiar_texto <- function(texto) {
  texto_limpio <- iconv(texto, to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  return(texto_limpio)
}

spp_link$recordedBy <- limpiar_texto(spp_link$recordedBy)

#entrada por autor
datos_filtrados <- spp_link %>% 
  filter(recordedBy == "Cervantes, E")
summary(datos_filtrados)
print(datos_filtrados)


datos_filtrados$occurrenceID #autor filtrados
```

```{r}
spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "COLECTORES, VARIOS"] <- "colectores, varios"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "COLECTORES, VARIOS"] <- "colectores, varios"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "Varios, colectores"] <- "varios, colectores"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "Serie de varios colectores"] <- "varios, colectores"

unique(spp_link$recordedBy[grep("colectores, varios", spp_link$recordedBy)])

#Standardized generic recordedBy values from uppercase to lowercase (COLECTORES, VARIOS → colectores, varios

```


```{r}
#Delete accent recordedBy

spp_link$recordedBy <- iconv(
  spp_link$recordedBy,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

grep("[ÁÉÍÓÚáéíóúÑñ]", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)

#Delete hyphen

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub("-", " ", spp_link$recordedBy, fixed = TRUE)

grep("-", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)

#Delete (Carlos) and review

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub("\\(Carlos\\)", "", spp_link$recordedBy)

grep("\\(Carlos\\)", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)


View(data.frame(recordedBy = sort(unique(spp_link$recordedBy))))

#Changes in "Serie de varios colectores"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == 
  "Serie de varios colectores, Serie de varios colectores"] <- 
  "serie de varios colectores"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "serie de varios colectores"]
```


```{r}
grep("Dodge", unique(spp_link$recordedBy), value = TRUE) #Review Dodge, ?"
```

```{r}

#Review identifiedBy column
View(data.frame(recordedBy = sort(unique(spp_link$identifiedBy))))

spp_link$identifiedBy <- iconv(
  spp_link$identifiedBy,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

grep("[ÁÉÍÓÚáéíóúÑñ]", spp_link$identifiedBy, value = TRUE)
grep("[Ññ]", spp_link$identifiedBy, value = TRUE)

spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("-", " ", spp_link$identifiedBy, fixed = TRUE)

# Removed hyphens from identifiedBy.
spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("-", " ", spp_link$identifiedBy, fixed = TRUE)


spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("\\s+", " ", spp_link$identifiedBy)
spp_link$identifiedBy <- trimws(spp_link$identifiedBy)

```


```{r}
View(data.frame(lifeForm = sort(unique(spp_link$lifeForm))))

spp_link$lifeForm <- iconv(
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub(", , ,", "", spp_link$lifeForm, fixed = TRUE)
spp_link$lifeForm <- trimws(spp_link$lifeForm)

#Corrected misspelled lifeForm value from "Sufructises" to "sufrutices"
spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Sufructises"] <- "sufrutices"
table(spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm %in% c("Sufructises", "Sufrutices")])
spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Sufructises"] <- "Sufrutices"
grep("Sufructises", spp_link$lifeForm, value = TRUE)



spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub(
  "Sufructises",
  "sufrutices",
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  fixed = TRUE
)

grep("Sufructises", spp_link$lifeForm, value = TRUE)

spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub(
  "sufrutices",
  "Sufrutices",
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  fixed = TRUE
)

#Fixed "-no definido-" by "no definido"
spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub("-", "", spp_link$lifeForm, fixed = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#extract year from evenDate

spp_link$year <- as.integer(substr(spp_link$eventDate, 1, 4))
head(spp_link[, c("eventDate", "year")], 10)

View(data.frame(year = sort(unique(spp_link$year))))
```

```{r}
#Bars

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(spp_link, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of occurrences by year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of records"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


#hystogram

ggplot(spp_link, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of occurrence years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

summary(spp_link$year)

table(spp_link$year)


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

spp_link %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of occurrences by year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of records"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
summary(spp_link$year)
sum(!is.na(spp_link$year))



library(ggplot2)

ggplot(subset(spp_link, !is.na(year)), aes(x = year)) +
  geom_bar()
```


```{r}
#Curated text_CR2024.cvs in 2.Processed folder

library(readr)

write_csv(
  spp_link,
  "data/Text/2.Processed/text__CR2024.csv"
)
```
